title: Create: Back to Basic
description:
This pack is focused on just expanding the vanilla experience with only one "tech"-mod: Create.
Mainly based on the Vanilla+ Pack and Fabulously Optimised
body:
# Create: Back to Basics

Create: Back to Basics is a lightweight modpack built around the Create mod, offering a fresh but familiar Minecraft experience. It aims to stay close to vanilla gameplay while enhancing it with quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, and a touch of automation.

This pack is ideal for players who enjoy the simplicity of vanilla Minecraft but want to experiment with Create's unique mechanical systems and a small selection of carefully chosen mods that add depth without bloat.
## ✨ Features

⚙️ Create mod at the core — build complex machines, factories, and kinetic contraptions.

🧰 Vanilla+ feel — curated additions like Farmer’s Delight, AppleSkin, and Better Combat.

🎮 Performance focused — includes Sodium, Iris, and other optimization mods.

🧱 Creative tools — build faster and better with Building Gadgets and Chisel & Bits support.

🌿 Visual upgrades — optional shaders, better skies, and improved UI without heavy resource costs.

🎯 Balanced progression — no tech trees or gated content, just Minecraft the way you like it.

## 📦 Built From

Based on Fabulously Optimized for performance

Inspired by Vanilla+ for minimalism and simplicity

## 💻 System Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.1

Java 17+

Recommended: 6–8 GB RAM allocated

## 📜 Philosophy

Keep Minecraft fun, fast, and familiar — just with more gears.
